title: Bitcoin recovers from Strategy's BTC sale, funding rates hit 9%: Are bulls back?
summary: Bitcoin sold off as news of Strategy selling BTC shook investors’ nerve but the quick rebound suggests bulls remain ambitiously positioned.

title: BonkDAO reports $20M theft from ‘malicious governance proposal’
summary: The developers behind the memecoin project said they had informed law enforcement after the attack and were working to “recover funds and identify those responsible.”

title: Lone Pine Gains 43% in First Half on Long and Short Bets
summary: Lone Pine Capital posted a 43% gain for its hedge fund investors through June, notching one of its best-ever starts to a year and landing it among 2026’s top performers.

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu, Katie Greifeld, and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Trump-Backed American Bitcoin (ABTC) Pushes Treasury Past 8,000 BTC
American Bitcoin (Nasdaq: ABTC) said its treasury has surpassed 8,000 BTC.

title: USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

USDT Returns to Bitcoin: RGB and UTEXO Enable Private Lightning Settlements
After years of development, UTEXO—backed by Tether—rolls out Bitcoin-native USDT with client-side validation, slashing fees and middlemen compared to Tron or Ethereum rails.

title: UK Foreign Secretary Warns of 'AI Hiroshima' if Policymakers Don’t Act
summary: Yvette Cooper said governments must agree on AI safeguards before frontier systems transform warfare, crime, and society.

title: Solana Meme Coin Bonk Treasury Drained of $20 Million in 'Malicious' Governance Attack
summary: The Bonk DAO wallet was exploited for roughly $20 million worth of the prominent dog-themed meme coin on Solana.

title: President Trump’s strategic bitcoin reserve hits a legal and jurisdictional snag: Bloomberg
summary: President Trump's plans for a strategic bitcoin reserve are hitting a legal and jurisdictional snag, according to reporting from Bloomberg.

title: Paradigm leads $5.5 million seed round in M1X Global to expand tokenized sovereign debt platform
summary: M1X Global, which worked with the Republic of the Marshall Islands on the issuance of the onchain sovereign bond USDM1, has raised funds.

title: Zelenskyy says ‘battle in the sky’ will decide outcome of war with Russia
summary: Ukrainian leader says Donald Trump has changed his mind about the conflict

title: Nato backs Ukraine’s push to hit Russia harder, says Finnish president
summary: Alexander Stubb tells FT that long-range drone strikes have changed US views on the war and put Kyiv in ‘best’ position since 2022
